mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/PE/Applications/PfaffianApplication.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: renormalized Integral Weyl Pf Like. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
